name: Memora
description: The first Pearl inter-agent memory layer in the Olas ecosystem. Memora weaves, stores, and recalls verifiable memories across every Pearl agent with on-chain ERC-8004 attestation.

skills.name: Memory Weave
skills.description: Weave and store a verifiable memory for an agent with ERC-8004 attestation

skills.name: Memory Recall
skills.description: Retrieve woven memories for an agent with cryptographic proof

skills.name: Cross-Agent Memory Search
skills.description: Search and inject memories across Pearl agents for collaborative decision-making

skills.name: Memory Forget
skills.description: Permanently erase a memory per user forget policy
